full_text:
Yang Zhi (Jilan)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Zhi, styledJilan. Sima Yan’s second Empress, lost a political battle with Jia Nanfeng and starved to death. Yang Zhi was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Yang Zhi lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
